allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('map'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('contour'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('terrain'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('topo'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('layer'\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,30\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
